title: New Slabs
description: My first mod where i have many slabs that are not in minecraft. Meant for creative building but are obtainable in survival
body:
My Slab Mod! This mod is meant for my building project, but I decided to add compatability stuff and release it to the public!

Known issues:
Grass block texture not changing based on biomes.
Grass block top has holes on the sides.
Grass block top slightly darker then it should be.
Next update should fix these issues.
